title: Dreams
questions: Do you dream in colour or in English?
Do you believe dreams have a special meaning?
Do you have the same dreams again and again?
Has something you've dreamt about ever come true?
Have you ever been woken up by a nightmare?
What kind of people do you meet in your dreams?
Would you like to stop having dreams or have more dreams?
Do you have the same dreams you had when you were a child?
Do you ever want to live in the world of your dreams?
Can you remember your dreams? What was the last dream you had?
Have you ever had a prophetic dream? What was it about? Do you believe that dreams can help us to predict the future?
Have you ever had a dream about a famous person? What happened in it?
Have you ever dreamed that you were in a strange house? Can you describe the house and what you were doing in it?
Have you ever had the same dream as someone else, at the same time? If so, what do you think this means?
Have you ever had a dream in which you were falling? What happened?
Did you daydream a lot when you were at school? Do you still daydream?
